mapper.sql: task_id, task_type, trade_id, business_key, business_type, priority, assignee_id, assignee_role, assignee_org, assignee_org_level, status, create_time, due_time, claim_time, complete_time, claim_lock, payload
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fx_task WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY priority DESC, create_time
SELECT FROM fx_task WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM fx_task WHERE assignee_id = #{assigneeId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fx_task (task_type, trade_id, business_key, business_type, priority, assignee_id, assignee_role, assignee_org, assignee_org_level, status, create_time, due_time, claim_time, complete_time, claim_lock, payload) VALUES (#{taskType}, #{tradeId}, #{businessKey}, #{businessType}, #{priority}, #{assigneeId}, #{assigneeRole}, #{assigneeOrg}, #{assigneeOrgLevel}, #{status}, NOW(), #{dueTime}, #{claimTime}, #{completeTime}, #{claimLock}, #{payload})
mapper.update: UPDATE fx_task SET status = #{status}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, claim_time = #{claimTime}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, claim_lock = #{claimLock} WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
